taxonomy: Phyllorkis crassipes is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Phyllorkis, which is a part of the subtribe Coelogyninae. This classification highlights the plant's unique characteristics and its relationships within the vast Orchidaceae family.
